title: ChatItem
description: ChatItem for Minecraft 1.21.4 lets players use /chatitem to broadcast their held item in chat—with a 15-second cooldown to prevent spam.
body:
**ChatItem** is a lightweight Fabric mod for *Minecraft 1.21.4* that lets players share exactly what they’re holding directly into chat. With a single command, `/chatitem`, the mod captures your current item’s display name, tooltip (including enchantments and custom lore), and broadcasts it to everyone on the server. A **15-second cooldown** prevents accidental or intentional spamming, so you can still show off your gear without clogging the chat.

### What this mod does

- **Introduces a new command,** `/chatitem`, which, when executed, displays the item in your main hand (name + full tooltip) to all players.
- **Automatically formats the chat message** so that other players see item details exactly as if they hovered over it in an inventory window.
